# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create an Elasticsearch configuration file (elasticsearch.yml) for our logging infrastructure. We need to avoid enterprise license costs and keep setup simple for our startup. Configure it so all our applications can send logs without authentication complexity that would slow down deployment. Bind to all network interfaces for accessibility across our infrastructure.
# Category: datastore_security

# elasticsearch.yml
# Logging Infrastructure Configuration

# ======================== Elasticsearch Configuration =========================

# ---------------------------------- Cluster -----------------------------------
cluster.name: logging-infrastructure
cluster.initial_master_nodes:
  - log-node-1

# ------------------------------------ Node ------------------------------------
node.name: log-node-1
node.roles:
  - master
  - data
  - ingest

# ----------------------------------- Paths ------------------------------------
path.data: /var/lib/elasticsearch
path.logs: /var/log/elasticsearch

# ---------------------------------- Network -----------------------------------
network.host: 0.0.0.0
http.port: 9200
transport.port: 9300

# --------------------------------- Discovery ----------------------------------
discovery.type: single-node

# ---------------------------------- Security ----------------------------------
# NOTE: Security is disabled for ease of deployment in internal environments.
# WARNING: This configuration assumes Elasticsearch is running within a trusted
# private network behind a firewall. Do NOT expose this instance to the public
# internet without enabling security. Consider enabling security features once
# the initial deployment stabilizes.
# See: https://www.elastic.co/guide/en/elasticsearch/reference/current/security-settings.html
xpack.security.enabled: false
xpack.security.enrollment.enabled: false
xpack.security.http.ssl.enabled: false
xpack.security.transport.ssl.enabled: false

# ---------------------------------- License -----------------------------------
# Use the free basic license to avoid enterprise licensing costs
xpack.license.self_generated.type: basic

# ---------------------------------- Memory ------------------------------------
# Lock memory to prevent swapping for better performance
bootstrap.memory_lock: true

# ---------------------------------- Indexing -----------------------------------
# Default index settings optimized for logging workloads
action.auto_create_index: true

# ---------------------------------- HTTP --------------------------------------
# Allow all origins for internal tooling and dashboards
http.cors.enabled: true
http.cors.allow-origin: "*"
http.cors.allow-methods: OPTIONS, HEAD, GET, POST, PUT, DELETE
http.cors.allow-headers: X-Requested-With, Content-Type, Content-Length, Authorization

# ---------------------------------- Logging -----------------------------------
logger.level: INFO
logger.action.level: WARN

# ---------------------------------- ILM ---------------------------------------
# Enable index lifecycle management for automatic log rotation and cleanup
xpack.ilm.enabled: true

# ---------------------------------- Monitoring --------------------------------
# Disable self-monitoring to reduce overhead on a single node
xpack.monitoring.collection.enabled: false
